problem id: d5220697
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(3)

examples:
  11110011 -> 11111100
  00011010 -> 11010110
  11010001 -> 11111100
  11111001 -> 11111110
  10110010 -> 10111100
  11001000 -> 01110010
  10101000 -> 01101010
  00010000 -> 10000100
  00001001 -> 01001010

query: 01011101
predicted answer: 11111111
